allow: PowerShell($src = "C:\\Development\\Dominoes\\_scaffold"; Get-ChildItem -Path $src -Force | ForEach-Object { Move-Item -Path $_.FullName -Destination "C:\\Development\\Dominoes\\" -Force }; Remove-Item -Path $src -Recurse -Force; Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Development\\Dominoes" -Force | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Development\\Dominoes"; "=== branch ==="; git branch --show-current; "=== changed file count ==="; \(git status --porcelain | Measure-Object\).Count; "=== node_modules ignored? ==="; git check-ignore node_modules; "=== sample status ==="; git status --short | Select-Object -First 25)
